creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, Apr 17, 2009 at 10:40:02PM +0000, Anton Yuzhaninov wrote:
>  FYI: Dovecot v1.1.14 was released with many useful bugfixes.

Thank you.  We are in a freeze right now and I intend to work with the
maintainer to get this update (or the 1.1.14 update) in the tree after
the freeze has lifted.  The maintainer has said there are some other
things he wants to work on before this update is applied, and it is my
hope that they will be ready for shortly after the freeze.

-- WXS
